    Enum TiffPhotometrics

    Photometric interpolation enum

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.Tiff.Enums
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public enum TiffPhotometrics : ushort

    Cielab

    1976 CIE Lab*.

    Icclab

    ICC Lab*. Introduced post TIFF rev 6.0 by Adobe TIFF Technote 4.

    Itulab

    ITU Lab*.

    Logl

    CIE Log2(L).

    Logluv

    CIE Log2(L) (u',v').

    Mask

    [obsoleted by TIFF rev. 6.0] Holdout mask.

    MinIsBlack

    Min value is black.

    MinIsWhite

    Min value is white.

    Palette

    Color map indexed.

    Rgb

    RGB color model.

    Separated

    Color separations.

    Ycbcr

    The CCIR 601.
